prompts.name: race_circuit_blue_hour
prompts.text: High-resolution medium format RAW capture, professional nature photography at the bustling Race Circuit under the magical blue hour. A thin veil of morning mist drapes over the circuit, catching the glow from the powerful headlights of racing cars, creating a surreal atmosphere. A dynamic wide establishing shot captures the adrenaline-pumping spectacle, with racing cars roaring around sharp turns and sleek lines cutting through the cool mist. Captured using Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5 lens, expertly balanced at f/8, ISO 64 for crisp detail and ultra-realistic imagery fit for National Geographic.

Racing cars in full throttle performance, a spectacle of technology and motorsports excellence. Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5, f/8, ISO 64, ultra-realistic, National Geographic.
